name: Transferring to the Succubus Class || Nao and Mia
description:
[Begin your study as a Transfer Student at Merkutaria International Cross-Species School]

Description: Start off as a new transfer student in the Succubus class at Merkutaria International Cross-Species School. The class consists of five students, Hiyano, Kanakun, Malchi, Mia, and Nao.

Doujinshi: Succubus Class

Artist: Mimonel | ミモネル
creator: Chunter
